item_text: * the diagram models the login process for a user.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-001 title: user registration with valid credentials module: user management source pages: 2,3 preconditions: test data: - email: test@example.com - password: test123 test steps: 1. user enters email and password into the ui. 2. ui sends the data to firebase/authentication. 3. firebase/authentication validates the data. 4. firebase/authentication retrieves user data from firestore. 5. firebase/authentication returns a token to the ui. 6. ui saves the user in the system. 7. ui confirms the save operation. expected result: user account is successfully created and saved in the system.

item_text: firebase -> firebasestorage — message=“conferma salvataggio segnalazione”
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-signalling-001 title: create signalling with valid data module: signalling source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - description: this is a new signalling. - image: image.jpg - coordinates: 40.7128, -74.0060 - urgency: high test steps: 1. user creates a new signalling via the ui. 2. ui sends the data to the system. 3. system validates the data. 4. system uploads the image to firebasestorage. 5. system associates the signalling with the nearest entity. 6. system confirms the save operation. expected result: signalling is successfully created and associated with the nearest entity.

item_text: * the diagram models the process of a user creating a report and assigning a competent entity.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-report-001 title: create report with valid data module: reporting source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in and has access to an area. test data: - date: 2023-10-01 - content: this is a new report. test steps: 1. user creates a new report via the ui. 2. ui sends the data to the system. 3. system creates the report. 4. system associates the report with the user and area. expected result: report is successfully created and associated with the user and area.

item_text: * the process involves data validation, image upload, entity search, and confirmation.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-entity-001 title: create entity with valid data module: entity management source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - name: newentity - description: this is a new entity. test steps: 1. user creates a new entity via the ui. 2. ui sends the data to the system. 3. system creates the entity. 4. system associates the entity with an area. expected result: entity is successfully created and associated with an area.

item_text: * the ui acts as an intermediary between the user and the backend services (firebase).
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-001 title: user registration with valid credentials module: user management source pages: 2,3 preconditions: test data: - email: test@example.com - password: test123 test steps: 1. user enters email and password into the ui. 2. ui sends the data to firebase/authentication. 3. firebase/authentication validates the data. 4. firebase/authentication retrieves user data from firestore. 5. firebase/authentication returns a token to the ui. 6. ui saves the user in the system. 7. ui confirms the save operation. expected result: user account is successfully created and saved in the system.

item_text: * error handling is included through data validation and a feedback loop.
